case_title: BANH, DAT TAN vs. MUEHLBAUER, MONEKA URBANSKE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANH, DAT TAN AS TO DEFENDANT MUEHLBAUER, MONEKA URBANSKE MUEHLBAUER, ROBERT SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-21-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-24-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-01-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-21-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-21-1993, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC RE CONTEMPT AGAINST PLT AND COUNSEL FOR FTA/FAILING TO FILE POS AND STATEMENTS. OSC WILL ALSO ADDRESS ISSUE OF WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PUR CRC 525. HEARING SET FOR SEP-07-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-07-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-07-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED. HEARING SET FOR OCT-07-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-07-1993, OFF CALENDAR
